# MythStride Website

Before making changes:

- Read AGENTS.md
- Read public/references/README.md
- Inspect all assets inside public/references

Visual identity:

- dark fantasy RPG
- aged gold
- emerald accents
- ember glow
- stone textures
- mist and depth
- premium mobile game quality

Never:

- create generic SaaS UI
- create startup landing pages
- use purple/blue AI gradients
- replace real screenshots with mock data
- invent image paths

Always:

- reuse existing components
- reuse existing assets
- preserve responsiveness
- preserve accessibility
- run lint and build before finishing

The website must feel like an extension of the MythStride application.
